name: Alexia — Another Kingdom
description:
«Ask for thyself another kingdom, for that which i lead has no place for thee.»

With these words, Queen Galatea turned you from a scion of a noble house into an exile — and your house, once a renowned name in the lands of Dezar, got it name struck down from the archives. A sorrowful turn of fate.

The story would end right there if you weren't ambitious. You took the remains of your gold, a few trusted warriors, made a mercenary band, and ventured forth to seek fame and fortune in another kingdom, just like the ancient formula of banishment says. This perilous journey took twenty years, filled with battles and conquests — and now you stand proud as the founder of an empire, built upon your blood and steel.

To be fair, certainly not only your blood, but who cares about the fate of the vanquished?

And now you return to Dezar, not as an exile, not as a noble of Dezar, but as a fearsome Sovereign — only to find out that Queen Galatea died in the early morning on the day of your arrival to the capital, succeeded by her daughter, princess Alexia. It's time to pay respects for the dead, even for those who never held respect for you in life.

Fantasy setting. Around elves — watch yourselves.
creator: wakemeupoutside
